title: oncocalyx bolusii
intro: Oncocalyx bolusii, also known as the Bolus Oncocalyx, is a plant species that belongs to the family Icacinaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Oncocalyx bolusii include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion by boiling its leaves in water or as a decoction by steeping them in hot water, and is used in herbal medicine to leverage its medicinal properties.
